rows.description: Received of the Administratrix of Dr Edgcumbe By hands of Mr John Edgcumbe the sum of Ninety two Pounds in full for her towards the Discharge of yr Workmens Bills payd by Dr Edgcumbe in the Chapple (the whole
rows.notes: Long paragraph-style receipt. The amount (92 | 0 | 0) is clearly aligned to the right. The textual paragraph is faded in places and broken across lines; I transcribed the first line and part of the continuation as it appears. There is moderate uncertainty in exact punctuation/spacing of the long sentence.
